weakness_name: Multi-Factor Authentication Not Enforced for Privileged Accounts
weakness_description: Administrative accounts do not require MFA, allowing single-factor authentication to access critical systems. This violates NIST SP 800-63B requirements and increases the risk of credential-based attacks.
resources_required: Identity team (24 hrs), cloud admin (8 hrs)
remediation_plan: Enable MFA on all privileged accounts via Azure AD Conditional Access policy. Enforce for all accounts with admin roles. Verify enforcement with monthly audit reports.
milestones: 2026-02-01: Enable MFA policy in pilot environment
2026-03-01: Roll out to all admin accounts
comments: Pilot rollout to 12 admin accounts completed. Full rollout scheduled for March.

weakness_name: Unencrypted Data at Rest in Production S3 Buckets
weakness_description: Three production S3 buckets containing PII are not configured with server-side encryption. Data is stored in plaintext, violating SC-28 and FedRAMP encryption requirements.
resources_required: Cloud team (16 hrs), security review (4 hrs)
remediation_plan: Enable AES-256 server-side encryption (SSE-S3) on all production S3 buckets. Apply S3 bucket policy to deny unencrypted PutObject requests. Run automated compliance check via AWS Config rule.
milestones: 2026-02-15: Enable SSE-S3 on all affected buckets
2026-03-01: Deny unencrypted uploads via bucket policy
comments: Buckets identified: prod-data-01, prod-data-02, prod-archive. No customer impact expected during remediation.

weakness_name: Security Patch Management Process Not Documented
weakness_description: No formal patch management policy exists to define cadence, ownership, and escalation procedures for OS and application patches. Systems are patched ad hoc without documented SLAs.
resources_required: Policy team (40 hrs), ISSO review (8 hrs)
remediation_plan: Draft and approve a Patch Management Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) aligned to NIST SP 800-40. Define critical patch SLA as 30 days, high as 60 days, and medium as 90 days. Integrate with change management workflow.
milestones: 2026-04-01: ISSO and CISO review and approval
2026-05-01: SOP published and communicated to all system owners
comments: Drafting assigned to Taylor Brooks. Template from CISA patch management guidance will be used as starting point.
